prose: The Fukui-reactivity result for nitrobenzene using DFT at the B3LYP functional with def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase (tier 'standard') was 0.47317276. The calculation was performed with charge 0 and multiplicity 1, using the chemkit computational chemistry tool. No warnings or errors were reported beyond mild charge conservation warnings, and the method was explicitly specified to ensure reproducibility.
